news.t: ETF investors appear hungry for international stocks despite looming tariffs
Principal Asset Management℠ launches Capital Appreciation Select ETF

holdings.infoBox: LCAP is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.53%, Apple at 6.20%, Alphabet at 5.68%, Microsoft at 4.24%, and Amazon.com at 3.89%.

overview.description: The Principal Capital Appreciation Select ETF (LCAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of US companies of any size, but tilts to large-cap stocks. It seeks long-term capital growth. LCAP was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by Principal.

data.text: DES MOINES, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Principal Asset Management℠ announced the launch of the Principal Capital Appreciation Select ETF (LCAP). This ETF will be managed by Principal Edge, an investment t...
